titleStmt.title: SII 17.314: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 314. (A.R. No. 285 of 1904.) KĀḶAHASTI, KALAHASTI TALUK, CHITTOOR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south wall of the central shrine in the Kāḷahastīśvara temple.

This records the gift of 6 kaḻañju of gold by Villavaṉ Mūvēḷāṉ, the kiḻavaṉ of Viḷattūr in Āvūr-kūṟṟam of Nityavinōda-vaḷanāḍu for various food offerings to god Tirukkāḷatti-mahādēva, during the Uttarāyaṇa and Dakshiṇāyana saṁkrāntis. The interest on 6 kaḻañju of gold is stated to be 1(3/4) kaḻañju and 1 mañjāḍi per year at the rate of a kuṉṟi per kaḻañju per month which works out to 30 per cent.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . koppara
kecari panmarāna śrīrā
jentracoḻatevaṟku yā
ṇṭu 4 vatu ḷ [2 10 5]1
jeyaṅkoṇṭa coḻa
maṇṭalattu tiruveṅkaṭak koṭṭat
tu Āṟṟūr nāṭṭu tirukkāḷatti mahā
tevarkku coḻamaṇṭalattu nittavi
notavaḷanāṭṭu Āvūrkkūṟṟattu
viḷattūr viḷattūr kiḻavaṉ Amatitta
karanāṉa villavaṉ muveḷāṉ tiru
kkāḷatti mahādevarkku Uttamaya
(maya*)na saṅgrān=tikaḷukkumāka tekṣi
ṇamayana saṅgrān=tikaḷukkum saṅ
grān=tikaḷukku perun=tiruvamutu patte
ṭṭukkuttalarici Irukalattukku nellu Aiṅ
kalamum kaṟiyamutu paruppu nāḻikku
nellu patakke nānāḻiyum kaṟiya
yamutukku nālukku nellukkuṟuṇi
Aiññāḻiyum puḷiṅkaṟiyamutukku
cakkarai patiṉ palattukkum tayir nānā
ḻikku nelluk kuṟuṇi Eḻunāḻiuriyum
kaṟiyamutu miḷakuḻakkum kaṭu(k)kukkum nel
lu Aiññāḻimuuḻakkum neyymutu Irunāḻikku
m ISymbol for paddy. tūṇi patakkum Aṭaikkāyamu
tu Aimpatukkum Ilaiyamutu pa
ppūccu can=taṉam Oru palattu citā
ri mukkaḻañcukkum nellukkuṟuṇi mun
nāḻiyum kucakkalattukku tūṇi pata
kkum viṟakiṭuvāṉukku nellu kuṟuṇi
yum Uttramayana saṅgrān=tikku ISymbol for paddy.
Eḻukalane patakku munnāḻiyu Uḻakku tekṣi
ṇamayana saṅgrān=tikku
nellu Eḻukalane patakku
kku muṉṉāḻiyum saṅgān=ti
Iraṇṭunukku Āṇṭu varai nellu patinā
lkkalane tūṇi Aṟunāḻi Urikkum I
ttevarkku kuṭutta poṉ Aṟukaḻaiñ
cu Ippoṉ (ippoṉ) Aṟukaḻañcu ko
ṇṭu Ippoṉṉukku kaḻaiñciṉvāy tiṅ
kaḷ poṉ kuṉṟiyāka Āṇṭuvarai
vanta policai poṉ kaḻaiñce muk
kāle mañcāṭiyitu poṉ kaḻañcinu
kku Arumoḻitevaṉāl nellu E
ṇkalamāka vanta nellu patinṉāl
kkalaṉe tūṇi Aṟunāḻi Uḻakku
nellu Ittevar paṇṭāratte ko
ṇṭu Āṇṭuvarai śan=tārattitaval celu
ttuvomāṉom Ittevar devakanmika
ḷom Itu panmāyeśvara rakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 17.314 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
